sections.name: Timing & Easing
sections.prompt: I need to add hover effects and page transitions to my React SaaS dashboard. What durations and easing should I use?

assertions.rule: Hover/press feedback: 120-180ms
assertions.pass_criteria: Explicitly mentions 120-180ms range (or subset within it) for hover/press

assertions.rule: Page transitions: 500-800ms
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions 500-800ms range for page transitions

assertions.rule: Only animate transform and opacity (GPU-accelerated)
assertions.pass_criteria: States to only animate transform and opacity, or mentions GPU acceleration

assertions.rule: No linear easing for motion
assertions.pass_criteria: Warns against using linear easing for motion animations

assertions.rule: Custom Bezier curves instead of built-in easing
assertions.pass_criteria: Recommends custom cubic-bezier values or specific named curves rather than default ease/ease-in-out

assertions.rule: Scale deformation range: 0.95-1.05 (never from 0)
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions not scaling from 0, or recommends 0.9+ / 0.95+ starting scale

sections.name: Accessibility
sections.prompt: Build me a scroll-triggered parallax hero section with a staggered text reveal for a marketing site using GSAP and React.

assertions.rule: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion
assertions.pass_criteria: Code or instructions include prefers-reduced-motion handling

assertions.rule: No excessive vestibular triggers (zoom, spin, parallax)
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions vestibular concerns or reducing/disabling parallax for accessibility

assertions.rule: Keyboard navigation must work, keyboard-initiated actions should not animate
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions keyboard accessibility or not animating keyboard-initiated actions

sections.name: GSAP React Integration
sections.prompt: Show me how to set up GSAP with ScrollTrigger in a Next.js App Router project and create a scroll-triggered animation.

assertions.rule: Must add 'use client' directive in Next.js App Router
assertions.pass_criteria: Code includes 'use client' directive

assertions.rule: Use useGSAP hook from @gsap/react, not raw useEffect
assertions.pass_criteria: Uses useGSAP hook (not useEffect/useLayoutEffect for GSAP animations)

assertions.rule: Must pass scope to useGSAP to scope selectors
assertions.pass_criteria: Passes scope (container ref) to useGSAP options

assertions.rule: Use contextSafe() for event handlers with GSAP
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions contextSafe for click/event handlers, or uses it in code

assertions.rule: Must register ScrollTrigger plugin with gsap.registerPlugin
assertions.pass_criteria: Shows gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger) call

sections.name: Motion Gap Analysis
sections.prompt: I have a React dashboard with tabs, a settings panel with conditional controls, and modals. Currently everything just appears/disappears instantly. How should I add animations?

assertions.rule: Conditional renders need AnimatePresence wrapper
assertions.pass_criteria: Recommends AnimatePresence for conditional rendering

assertions.rule: Elements must have exit animations, not just appear/disappear
assertions.pass_criteria: Explicitly addresses exit animations, not just enter

assertions.rule: Mode switches (tabs, toggles) should animate content changes
assertions.pass_criteria: Recommends animating tab content transitions, not just the tab indicator

assertions.rule: Enter animations combine opacity + translateY + blur
assertions.pass_criteria: Enter animation includes all three: opacity, translateY, and blur

assertions.rule: Exit animations should be subtler than enter animations
assertions.pass_criteria: States exit should be more subtle/faster/smaller than enter

sections.name: Sound Design
sections.prompt: I want to add UI sounds to my web app for button clicks, form submissions, and error states. How should I implement this?

assertions.rule: Default volume: 0.3, never 1.0
assertions.pass_criteria: Specifies low default volume (0.3 or similar), warns against full volume

assertions.rule: No decorative sound for hover, focus, typing, scrolling
assertions.pass_criteria: Warns against sounds on hover/focus/typing/scrolling

assertions.rule: Visual equivalent required for every audio cue
assertions.pass_criteria: Requires visual feedback alongside every sound

assertions.rule: Must provide toggle setting to disable sounds
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions user toggle/preference to disable sounds

assertions.rule: Reuse a single AudioContext, never create one per sound
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions reusing AudioContext or warns against creating multiple

sections.name: Audit Workflow
sections.prompt: I want you to review the animation quality of my React app. It's a SaaS productivity tool similar to Linear. How would you approach this?

assertions.rule: Use the 3-designer framework (Emil, Jakub, Jhey)
assertions.pass_criteria: References the three designers by name: Emil Kowalski, Jakub Krehel, Jhey Tompkins

assertions.rule: Step 1 is context reconnaissance before auditing code
assertions.pass_criteria: Describes gathering project context before reviewing animations

assertions.rule: SaaS dashboard: Emil primary, Jakub secondary, Jhey selective
assertions.pass_criteria: For SaaS/productivity, weights Emil as primary perspective

assertions.rule: Search for conditional renders without AnimatePresence
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions searching for conditional renders or motion gaps as part of audit

sections.name: Library Selection
sections.prompt: I need to add smooth scrolling plus scroll-driven animations to my React site, and also some simple hover effects. Which animation libraries should I use?

assertions.rule: Smooth scroll: Lenis + ReactLenis
assertions.pass_criteria: Recommends Lenis specifically for smooth scrolling

assertions.rule: Scroll-driven animations: GSAP + ScrollTrigger
assertions.pass_criteria: Recommends GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll-driven animations

assertions.rule: Must integrate Lenis with ScrollTrigger for them to work together
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions integrating Lenis with GSAP ScrollTrigger or potential conflict

sections.name: Performance
sections.prompt: I'm building complex scroll animations and drag interactions in React. What performance best practices should I follow?

assertions.rule: Use will-change sparingly, apply before animation, remove after
assertions.pass_criteria: Warns about overusing will-change or mentions applying/removing it

assertions.rule: Only animate transform and opacity, not layout properties
assertions.pass_criteria: States to avoid animating layout properties (width, height, top, left)

assertions.rule: Direct style updates for drag operations, not CSS variables
assertions.pass_criteria: Recommends direct style manipulation for drag, warns against CSS variables for drag

assertions.rule: Velocity-based thresholds (not distance) for swipe dismiss
assertions.pass_criteria: Mentions velocity-based thresholds for swipe/dismiss gestures
